name: Fisherman's Bouillabaisse
recipeIngredient: 1 Env. Onion or Onion-mushroom Soup Mix
14 1/2 oz Can Tomatoes, whole peeled and unstrained
1 1/2 lb Lobster Tails (3), cut into 3-inch pieces
1 lb Red Snapper, cod, hallibut, or haddock, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or stockpot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Cook the garlic until golden.
3. Add water, wine, soup mix, parsley, and thyme; stir to combine.
4. Stir in the chopped tomatoes. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer covered for 15 minutes.
6. Add the lobster and fish pieces; simmer an additional 10 minutes.
7. Add the clams and mussels; simmer another 5 minutes or until shells open.
8. Discard any unopened shells.
9. Serve with bread or rolls, if desired. Makes about 4 servings of 2 cups each.
